description: Composition:Grey strapped and black insole floaters with synthetic upper and mesh, foam padded lining, phylon cushioned footbed, forefoot, back and midfoot strapAction:An ideal trek footwear and for casual outings, this pair of black and grey sandals from puma is water resistant. Its durable rubber outsole coupled with forefoot, midfoot and backfoot straps give your feet that much needed grip and comfort.
